title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.300 - Buddy Check 22 day designated for the twenty-second day of each month
text:
9.300.  Buddy Check 22 day designated for the twenty-second day of each month. — The twenty-second day of each month shall be and is hereby designated as "Buddy Check 22 Day" in the state of Missouri to promote education and awareness of the problems of suicide facing military personnel.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to check in on veterans on the twenty-second day of each month and participate in appropriate events and activities that raise awareness of the problem of suicide facing military personnel.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1682 merged with S.B. 656 § 9.311)
